name_en: 。🌷《With full original red box packaging》🌷【New】 The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, crafted to be a collectible choice for years to come. This full zip wallet is crafted with a new black GG interweave pattern fabric, reinterpreting the new accessory series. Features 12 card slots and other multi-functional compartments.
name_cn:
。🌷《With full original red box packaging》🌷【New】 The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, crafted to be a collectible choice for years to come. This full zip wallet is crafted with a new black GG interweave pattern fabric, reinterpreting the new accessory series. Features 12 card slots and other multi-functional compartments.
New black GG interweave pattern coated fabric
Black leather trim
Interior: Twelve card slots, three bill compartments, and a zip coin pouch
Zip closure
Model: 821207.
19cm (W) x 10.5cm (H) x 2.5cm (D)
Weight: Approx. 230g
Color: Glossy black leather/Original leather.
Italian creation
